name: @ranimontagna/agent-toolkit
description: Personal AI agent toolkit installer for Claude Code, Codex CLI, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Antigravity and graph-aware workflows.

scripts.check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run build && find dist/bin dist/src -name '*.js' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check && bash -n setup-agent-toolkit.sh && bash -n scripts/publish-npm-with-retry.sh && bash -n tests/publish-npm-with-retry.test.sh && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.release:major: pnpm run build && node dist/src/release.js major
scripts.release:minor: pnpm run build && node dist/src/release.js minor
scripts.release:patch: pnpm run build && node dist/src/release.js patch
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.test:integration: pnpm run build && bash tests/test-agent-toolkit.sh && bash tests/publish-npm-with-retry.test.sh
